title: Illinois Tool (ITW) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Illinois Tool's (ITW) second-quarter 2022 earnings are likely to have gained from its acquired assets. However, supply-chain challenges might have hurt performance.

title: 7 Safe Dividends Stocks to Buy in July
text: Rising interest rates and talk of an upcoming recession have investors seeking safety in their portfolios with high dividend-paying stocks. The post 7 Safe Dividends Stocks to Buy in July appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Reasons Why You Should Avoid Betting on Illinois Tool (ITW)
text: Illinois Tool (ITW) is grappling with raw material costinflation and supply-chain constraints. Weakness in the Automotive OEM segment and forex woes are other concerns for ITW.

title: ITW Schedules Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., July 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) will issue its second quarter 2022 results on Tuesday, August 2, 2022 at 7:00 a.m. CDT. Following the release, ITW will hold its second quarter earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT.
